protected_attributes.description: Attributes that must NOT be changed in counterfactual explanations to preserve privacy
protected_attributes.rationale: These represent sensitive personal information that should not be suggested for modification

actionable_attributes.description: Attributes that users can reasonably change and should be used in recourse
actionable_attributes.rationale: These are controllable factors that users can modify to reduce fraud risk

immutable_attributes.description: Attributes that cannot be changed (historical or fixed)
immutable_attributes.rationale: Historical data that cannot be retroactively changed
